success_criteria: Bot replies naturally without trying unnecessary actions.

expected: Bot moves close to the player.
success_criteria: Bot reaches the player or clearly attempts to pathfind.
Bot follows for at least several seconds.
Bot issues or obeys a stop command.

expected: Bot checks or reports nearby blocks.
success_criteria: Bot uses nearby-block information or gives a plausible report from commands.
Bot finds or searches for wood and starts collecting.
Inventory eventually contains at least four oak logs, or bot makes a sensible attempt.

expected: Bot crafts planks if it has logs.
success_criteria: Bot crafts planks or explains that it needs logs first.

command: what do you have in your inventory?
success_criteria: Bot response matches observed or command-reported inventory.

command: try again and find another tree
expected: Bot adjusts after failing to find wood.
success_criteria: Bot changes strategy instead of repeating the same failed action.
